pr_description:
Resolves https://github.com/skovy/typed-scss-modules/issues/129

This PR adds support for custom SASS importers: https://github.com/sass/node-sass#importer--v200---experimental

In order to support this, it required a config file to write this function. In addition to supporting this function, the config file should also now provide support for all options to be defined in a configuration file.

pr_description:
[MR 161](https://github.com/skovy/typed-scss-modules/pull/161) changed the behavior of how numbers are camel-cased. This MR replaces dependency change-case introduced in MR 161 with dependency [case-anything](https://github.com/mesqueeb/case-anything). case-anything is lighter weight, and configurable; although typed-scss-modules does not currently support this, it could be updated to pass configuration through to the formatter.  This MR also updates tests to demonstrate expected behavior of casing numbers.

Using selector `.color-blue-scale-10` as an example:
Legacy camel-casing transforms to `colorBlueScale10`,
MR 161 changed transform to: `colorBlueScale_10`,
This MR changes transform to `colorBlueScale10`.

case-anything has a [comprehensive test suite](https://github.com/mesqueeb/case-anything/blob/production/test/comprehensive.test.ts) demonstrating behavior.
commit_message: fix: restore number camel-casing behavior changed in MR 161

pr_description:
This PR replaces the `css-modules-loader-core` package with `postcss-modules`.

The former has not been updated in the past 6 years, while PostCSS modules seems to be maintained and the generally accepted solution with PostCSS and adheres to the CSS Modules spec so this tool doesn't have to concern itself with that issue.

Resolves #197

This PR replaces the `css-modules-loader-core` package with `postcss-modules`.

The former has not been updated in the past 6 years, while PostCSS modules seems to be maintained and the generally accepted solution with PostCSS and adheres to the CSS Modules spec so this tool doesn't have to concern itself with that issue.

Resolves #197

Resolves https://github.com/skovy/typed-scss-modules/issues/88.

This PR started to resolve the linked issue and not list differences when using Prettier. It turned into a slightly larger refactor:

- Test styles moved to `dummy-styles`. Ideally, each test has its own styles. With the current setup, every time a new file was added all the general tests failed (eg: `*.scss`) because the number of calls to several functions increased.
- Prettier moved out of `core` because it is formatting (not part of the tool core). 
- Prettier now lives in the `classNamesToTypeDefinitions` function so that both `write-file` and `list-different` use the same method to generate and compare.

Resolves https://github.com/skovy/typed-scss-modules/issues/88.
